name: Migration Vitest v3 → v4
description: Migrate the Maz UI monorepo from Vitest v3 to Vitest v4.0.18, updating all 5 packages (lib, utils, themes, translations, mcp) with config adaptations, snapshot regeneration, and regression fixes.

userStories.title: Bump Vitest dependencies to v4.0.18
userStories.description: As a developer, I want vitest and @vitest/coverage-v8 updated to 4.0.18 across all packages so that the monorepo uses the latest major version.
acceptanceCriteria: vitest is updated to 4.0.18 in all package.json files that reference it
@vitest/coverage-v8 is updated to 4.0.18 in all package.json files that reference it
Any other vitest-related dependency (@vitest/*) is updated to a compatible version
pnpm install runs without errors after the updates
pnpm typecheck:all passes
pnpm lint:fix:all passes
userStories.notes: Packages with vitest config: packages/lib, packages/utils, packages/themes, packages/translations, packages/mcp

userStories.title: Update vitest.config.ts exclude patterns
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the vitest configs to explicitly define exclude patterns so that the removal of v3 defaults (dist, cypress, .nuxt, etc.) does not cause unwanted test file discovery.
acceptanceCriteria: Each vitest.config.ts includes explicit exclude patterns: **/node_modules/**, **/dist/**, **/cypress/**, **/.{idea,git,cache,output,temp}/**, **/{karma,rollup,webpack,vite,vitest,jest,ava,babel,nyc,cypress,tsup,build,eslint,prettier}.config.*
Patterns are added only where relevant (no unnecessary patterns)
No non-test files are discovered by vitest
pnpm test:unit:all passes
pnpm typecheck:all passes
pnpm lint:fix:all passes
userStories.notes: In v4, exclude defaults are reduced to just node_modules and .git

userStories.title: Configure coverage.include for all packages
userStories.description: As a developer, I want coverage.include explicitly configured in all packages with coverage config so that Codecov reports are accurate and don't show inflated coverage.
acceptanceCriteria: coverage.include is added in vitest config of packages/lib
coverage.include is added in vitest config of packages/utils
coverage.include is added in vitest config of packages/themes
coverage.include is added in vitest config of packages/translations
coverage.include is added in vitest config of packages/mcp (if coverage is configured)
Include patterns target relevant source files (e.g., src/**/*.ts, src/**/*.vue)
Coverage reports reflect only actual source code
pnpm test:unit:all passes
pnpm typecheck:all passes
pnpm lint:fix:all passes
userStories.notes: In v4, coverage.all is removed — only covered files are included by default

userStories.title: Regenerate snapshots in v4 format
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all snapshots regenerated in the v4 format so that tests using snapshots pass without manual intervention.
acceptanceCriteria: All existing snapshot files are regenerated with vitest --update
Snapshots use the new v4 format (no quotes around names)
All tests using snapshots pass
pnpm test:unit:all passes
pnpm typecheck:all passes
pnpm lint:fix:all passes

userStories.title: Fix regressions from vi.mock and other breaking changes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want any test failures caused by v4 breaking changes (vi.mock hoisting, globals access, etc.) fixed so that the full test suite passes.
acceptanceCriteria: All vi.mock usages with factory work correctly after migration
Any globals access in vi.mock factories is fixed
Imports of vi from vitest are added where needed if globals: true is no longer sufficient
pnpm test:unit:all passes at 100% with no skips or exclusions
pnpm typecheck:all passes
pnpm lint:fix:all passes
userStories.notes: In v4, vi.mock factories are no longer automatically hoisted
